channel.title: GitHub Lua Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Lua in GitHub

item.title: koreader/koreader
item.description: An ebook reader application supporting PDF, DjVu, EPUB, FB2 and many more formats, running on Cervantes, Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook and Android devices

item.title: stevearc/conform.nvim
item.description: Lightweight yet powerful formatter plugin for Neovim

item.title: LuaLS/lua-language-server
item.description: A language server that offers Lua language support - programmed in Lua

item.title: nvim-telescope/telescope.nvim
item.description: Find, Filter, Preview, Pick. All lua, all the time.

item.title: tarantool/tarantool
item.description: Get your data in RAM. Get compute close to data. Enjoy the performance.

item.title: nvim-tree/nvim-tree.lua
item.description: A file explorer tree for neovim written in lua

item.title: yetone/avante.nvim
item.description: Use your Neovim like using Cursor AI IDE!

item.title: folke/lazy.nvim
item.description: 💤 A modern plugin manager for Neovim

item.title: Kong/kong
item.description: 🦍 The Cloud-Native API Gateway and AI Gateway.

item.title: kdheepak/lazygit.nvim
item.description: Plugin for calling lazygit from within neovim.

item.title: Eandrju/cellular-automaton.nvim
item.description: A useless plugin that might help you cope with stubbornly broken tests or overall lack of sense in life. It lets you execute aesthetically pleasing, cellular automaton animations based on the content of neovim buffer.
